summary: A sparse orange-white-black flat illustration system with a white mascot figure, oversized prop, rough black dry-brush linework, orange cheek circles, and screen-printed paper grain.
prompt_template:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: style growth sample / poster illustration
Primary request: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Orange Brush Mascot Action Poster" style using Image 2 as style reference only.

Input images: Image 2: style reference for orange-white-black flat mascot illustration, rough dry-brush lines, oversized prop composition, screen-print grain.
Scene/backdrop: {LOCATION}.
Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Style/medium: minimal flat editorial illustration, rough black dry-brush ink, screen-printed paper texture, white mascot shapes on saturated orange.
Composition/framing: {ASPECT_RATIO}, tightly cropped poster frame, one giant prop overlapping the character, sparse negative space.
Lighting/mood: no realistic lighting, flat graphic contrast, playful and mischievous mood.
Color palette: saturated orange, paper white, carbon black, orange cheek circles only.
Text (verbatim): {MAIN_TEXT}; keep text absent if value is "none".
Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}; keep absent if value is "none".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or visual styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.
Constraints: preserve the reference style but create a new case; do not copy the exact original scene; no logos; no watermark.
Avoid: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, polished vector art, gradients, 3D, photorealism, realistic human anatomy, complex scenery, many colors, anime, corporate mascot, sticker-pack polish.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, brand logo, polished vector icon, perfect clean line, gradients, 3D render, photorealism, realistic human face, glossy plastic mascot, plush toy, complex environment, dense props, many colors, neon palette, anime, manga screentone, corporate mascot, sticker sheet, decorative frame, readable UI text

variables.SUBJECT: main flat white mascot, face, hand, or simplified character
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: spinning, peeking, pulling, bracing, catching, blowing, balancing, pointing, or reacting
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized basketball, camera, noodle bowl, kite, fan, record, umbrella, clock, flower, or other simple graphic prop
variables.LOCATION: empty orange poster field or ultra-minimal graphic stage
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: paper grain, black motion ticks, white cutout burst, wind curl, sparse speed lines, or nothing
variables.MAIN_TEXT: usually none; optional one short black hand-brushed word only when needed
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: usually none; optional tiny loose black side note
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: orange cheek circles, black dry-brush motion marks, rough circles, jagged white burst, or curved ear marks
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: white block face and hands, black rectangle shorts or body, no realistic clothing, no detailed wardrobe

variables.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot figure with orange cheek circles
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: spinning a giant orange basketball on two fingers while squinting
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized basketball drawn as a rough black dry-brush circle with loose panel lines
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a few black motion ticks and sparse print speckles
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: black circular speed strokes and tiny orange cheek dots
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: white cartoon hand shapes, white round face, black rectangle shorts, no realistic clothing

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 Orange Brush Mascot Action Poster image. Use Image 2 as style reference only: saturated orange full-bleed background, white flat mascot face and hands, rough black dry-brush linework, orange cheek circles, oversized graphic prop, sparse screen-print poster composition. Case: Hoop Orbit. Subject: a white flat mascot figure with orange cheek circles. Action: spinning a giant orange basketball on two fingers while squinting. Prop: oversized basketball drawn as a rough black dry-brush circle with loose panel lines. Scene: empty orange poster field. Background marks: a few black motion ticks and sparse print speckles. Accent: black circular speed strokes and tiny orange cheek dots. Character styling: white cartoon hand shapes, white round face, black rectangle shorts, no realistic clothing. Text: none; do not include readable text. Spread the oversized ball on the left and the mascot on the right with both cropped by the wide frame. Keep the palette strictly orange, white, and black. Avoid logos, watermark, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, app UI, gradients, 3D, photorealism, polished vector lines, complex environment, extra colors, and dense text.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a vertical 9:16 Orange Brush Mascot Action Poster image. Use Image 2 as style reference only: saturated orange full-bleed background, white flat mascot face and hands, rough black dry-brush linework, orange cheek circles, oversized graphic prop, sparse screen-print poster composition. Case: Hoop Orbit. Subject: a white flat mascot figure with orange cheek circles. Action: spinning a giant orange basketball on two fingers while squinting. Prop: oversized basketball drawn as a rough black dry-brush circle with loose panel lines. Scene: empty orange poster field. Background marks: a few black motion ticks and sparse print speckles. Accent: black circular speed strokes and tiny orange cheek dots. Character styling: white cartoon hand shapes, white round face, black rectangle shorts, no realistic clothing. Text: none; do not include readable text. Stack the oversized ball and character vertically, with the ball dominating the upper half and the mascot partly cropped at the bottom. Keep the palette strictly orange, white, and black. Avoid logos, watermark, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, app UI, gradients, 3D, photorealism, polished vector lines, complex environment, extra colors, and dense text.

variables.SUBJECT: a white flat mascot face peeking from behind a huge camera
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: pressing the shutter while one eye disappears behind the lens
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized black brush camera with a large circular lens and orange flash shape
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: one white flash cutout shape and rough black click marks
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: jagged white flash burst and dry-brush click ticks
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: white face, white fingers, black eyebrow marks, simple black lower block
